Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class EmailMessage

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.EmailMessage
public class EmailMessage extends SObject

Java class for EmailMessage complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmailMessage">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActivityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BccAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BccIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Cases" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CcAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CcIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClientThreadIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmailMessageRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmailTemplate" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}EmailTemplate" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmailTemplateId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstOpenedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FromAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FromName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasAttachment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Headers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HtmlBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Incoming" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsBounced" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsClientManaged" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsExternallyVisible" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOpened" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsTracked" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastOpenedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Parent" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Case" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedTo" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedToId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplyToEmailMessage" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}EmailMessage" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplyToEmailMessageId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TextBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ThreadIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ToAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ToIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ValidatedFromAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      Sets the value of the bccAddress property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getBccIds

      public List<String> getBccIds()
      Gets the value of the bccIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the bccIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBccIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the bccIds property.

    • getCases

      public QueryResult getCases()
      Gets the value of the cases property.
      Returns:
      possible object is QueryResult

    • setCases

      public void setCases(QueryResult value)
      Sets the value of the cases property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is QueryResult

      Gets the value of the ccAddress property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

      public void setCcAddress(String value)
      Sets the value of the ccAddress property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getCcIds

      public List<String> getCcIds()
      Gets the value of the ccIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the ccIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCcIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the ccIds property.

    • getContentDocumentIds

      public List<String> getContentDocumentIds()
      Gets the value of the contentDocumentIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the contentDocumentIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getContentDocumentIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the contentDocumentIds property.

    • getContentDocumentLinks

      public QueryResult getContentDocumentLinks()
      Gets the value of the contentDocumentLinks property.
      Returns:
      possible object is QueryResult

    • setContentDocumentLinks

      public void setContentDocumentLinks(QueryResult value)

      value - allowed object is String

    • getToIds

      public List<String> getToIds()
      Gets the value of the toIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the toIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getToIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the toIds property.

    • getValidatedFromAddress

      public String getValidatedFromAddress()

      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setValidatedFromAddress

      public void setValidatedFromAddress(String value)
      Sets the value of the validatedFromAddress property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String
